lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.title: 67 Speed How to Play
lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.intro: 67 Speed is a browser challenge where your camera counts alternating arm pumps. A compact setup and steady rhythm produce cleaner runs.

steps.title: Open 67speed.com and allow camera access
steps.description: Start on the official site and grant camera permission before the countdown. Without permission, the run cannot be tracked correctly.

steps.title: Stand centered with elbows bent
steps.description: Face the camera directly and keep both arms visible. A compact stance helps the tracker detect each alternating pump.

steps.title: Alternate arm pumps for the full round
steps.description: Move both arms up and down alternately as fast as possible while staying controlled from start to finish.

steps.title: Keep motion rhythmic instead of chaotic
steps.description: Clean, repeatable motion often scores better than random movement bursts because tracking stays consistent.

steps.title: Use landscape mode and bright lighting on phones
steps.description: Mobile runs are easier to track when the phone is horizontal and the room light clearly outlines both arms.

steps.title: Use Safari on iPhone for the smoothest session
steps.description: iOS sessions are most stable in Safari. Avoid private tabs if camera permission is blocked.

quickTips: Keep your full upper body inside the frame before tapping Start.
Warm up for 20 to 30 seconds to reduce early fatigue during max-speed rounds.
Use a fixed phone or laptop angle so tracking does not drift mid-run.
Record your best cadence pattern and reuse it in later attempts.

Keep background clutter low so arm movement stays clear against the frame.
Use stable internet if you plan to compare runs on leaderboard pages immediately.
Retry quickly after each round while your pacing rhythm is still fresh.

lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.title: 67 Speed Explained
lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.intro: 67 Speed is built around one simple loop: get in frame, pump your arms as fast as you can, and chase a bigger number. It feels closer to a webcam challenge with leaderboard energy than to a content-heavy game with stages or progression.

items.question: What is 67 Speed?
items.answer: 67 Speed is a free-to-play web-based arm speed challenge that uses your device camera to track motion and score your alternating arm pumps.

items.question: How does one 67 Speed round work?
items.answer: Stand in front of the camera, keep your upper body visible, bend your elbows, and pump your arms up and down alternately for 20 seconds.

items.question: Where can you play 67 Speed?
items.answer: The core version runs instantly in the browser with no download required, and the official site says it works on both desktop and mobile.

items.question: What does a 67 Speed score measure?
items.answer: The game tracks movement in real time and adds to your total as your arms keep moving. Faster, cleaner bursts create bigger numbers and better leaderboard chances.

items.question: Why did 67 Speed go viral?
items.answer: The setup is easy to understand, each run only lasts 20 seconds, and streamer rivalries turned simple attempts into highly watchable clips.

lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.intro: The viral wave took off when big creators started posting 20-second attempts and trying to top each other. The table below pulls together the clearest public scores attached to that first breakout round of coverage.

items.highlight: Opened with 448 on his first run, then came back and pushed a second run to 515.

lucidBlocksMobilityGear.title: 67 Speed Tips
lucidBlocksMobilityGear.intro: Most gains in 67 Speed come from setup and readable movement, not from secret mechanics. Good framing, a clear arm path, and the right mobile setup make the challenge feel much less random.

items.question: How should you frame your 67 Speed setup?
items.answer: Give yourself enough space to move and keep your upper body visible before the timer starts. A clean frame is the base layer for every good run.

items.question: What arm motion works best in 67 Speed?
items.answer: Keep your elbows bent and move your arms up and down alternately. Clean alternation is the core motion the challenge is built around.

items.question: Should both hands move in every 67 Speed burst?
items.answer: Yes. Both hands are tracked in real time and every movement counts, so inactive arm motion directly limits score growth.

items.question: What mobile setup improves 67 Speed tracking?
items.answer: Rotate to landscape and fix your lighting before each round. This setup makes fast movement easier for the camera to read.

items.question: Which round format is best for 67 Speed benchmarking?
items.answer: Use 20-second runs when you want direct comparison with viral clips and streamer score races, then use shorter rounds for warmup.

lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.title: 67 Speed Mobile Guide
lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.intro: Use this 67 Speed mobile setup flow before every phone run. It keeps motion tracking clean and helps you decide when the iOS app is the easier choice.

steps.title: Choose 67 Speed web or the 67 Speed iOS app first
steps.description: 67 Speed runs on desktop and mobile. On phone, start with browser play for instant access or switch to the iOS app for a dedicated mobile setup.

steps.title: Use Safari for 67 Speed on iPhone web
steps.description: 67 Speed guidance recommends Safari on iOS web sessions. Some private browsing sessions can block camera access.

steps.title: Allow camera access before the 67 Speed countdown
steps.description: 67 Speed requires camera permission to read your movement. If access is blocked, your run cannot track correctly.

steps.title: Rotate your phone to landscape for 67 Speed
steps.description: Landscape framing gives both arms more room and matches the mobile setup guidance highlighted for 67 Speed.

steps.title: Keep upper body visible and elbows bent in 67 Speed
steps.description: Show your upper body clearly in frame and bend your elbows before each round. Clean framing helps 67 Speed detect alternating arm motion.

steps.title: Use bright lighting for 67 Speed mobile runs
steps.description: Good lighting improves visibility and helps 67 Speed tracking stay stable during fast movement.

steps.title: Pick the 67 Speed round that matches your routine
steps.description: Web sessions center on the 20-second challenge, while the iOS app also supports quick 10-second rounds with haptics and native camera handling.

lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.title: 67 Speed Score Not Saving
lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.intro: Most 67 Speed score issues come from account state, camera permission, or tracking visibility. Use these fixes before you retry another run.

faqs.question: Why did my 67 Speed run show up but not stay on my profile?
faqs.answer: Anonymous 67 Speed scores can appear on the leaderboard, but they are not permanently linked to an account profile.

faqs.question: How do I keep 67 Speed highscores and progress?
faqs.answer: Create a free 67 Speed account to save high scores and keep progress tied to your profile.

faqs.question: What should I check first if 67 Speed did not register anything?
faqs.answer: Confirm camera permission is enabled. On iOS web, Safari is the preferred browser, and some private sessions can block camera access.

faqs.question: What 67 Speed phone setup causes missed motion?
faqs.answer: Portrait orientation, weak lighting, or partial framing can cause tracking misses. Use landscape mode, keep your upper body visible, and improve room lighting.

faqs.question: Why is an older 67 Speed leaderboard entry missing?
faqs.answer: The public 67 Speed leaderboard resets every 48 hours, so older entries can disappear even after a valid run.

faqs.question: Can a 67 Speed leaderboard entry be removed or moderated?
faqs.answer: Yes. 67 Speed terms state that user-generated content, including display names and leaderboard entries, is subject to moderation.

faqs.question: Where do I report a persistent 67 Speed issue?
faqs.answer: Use the official 67 Speed contact page or email 67speedgame@gmail.com for ongoing troubleshooting.

lucidBlocksAchievementTracker.title: 67 Speed Privacy and Safety
lucidBlocksAchievementTracker.intro: 67 Speed privacy is easiest to understand as a web-versus-app split: web camera tracking is described as local processing, while account features and iOS app data have separate disclosure rules.

faqs.question: Does 67 Speed upload my camera feed?
faqs.answer: No. 67 Speed privacy guidance states that camera data is not collected, stored, or transmitted, and gameplay video processing runs locally on your device.

faqs.question: What does 67 Speed anonymous play store?
faqs.answer: 67 Speed says anonymous sessions store only display name and score, without requiring email or account creation.

faqs.question: What does a 67 Speed account add?
faqs.answer: A 67 Speed account can store your email address and display name, and terms also mention an optional X account connection for verification.

faqs.question: What is public on the 67 Speed leaderboard?
faqs.answer: 67 Speed display names and leaderboard entries are public-facing, and terms state this content can be moderated.

faqs.question: Is there an age rule for 67 Speed accounts?
faqs.answer: 67 Speed states the service is not intended for children under 13, and account creation requires users to be at least 13.

faqs.question: What does the 67 Speed iOS app disclose on privacy?
faqs.answer: The 67 Speed iOS privacy label says Usage Data may be used to track users across apps and websites, and may be linked to users for analytics and advertising.

faqs.question: Who handles 67 Speed privacy questions?
faqs.answer: 67 Speed directs privacy inquiries to support@67speed.com.

lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.title: 67 Speed Web vs App
lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.intro: Both versions run the same 67 Speed challenge, but startup flow, device behavior, and mobile convenience differ. Use this comparison to pick the format that matches your routine.

comparisons.web: Play instantly in browser with no download.
comparisons.app: Download the free app from the App Store.

comparisons.web: Officially supports desktop and mobile browsers.
comparisons.app: Runs on iPhone and iPad with iOS or iPadOS 17.6 or later.

comparisons.web: Requires browser camera permission. On iPhone web, Safari is recommended and some private sessions can block access.
comparisons.app: Highlights native camera performance for a dedicated mobile setup.

comparisons.web: Mobile guidance emphasizes landscape orientation and good lighting.
comparisons.app: Positioned as the full 67 Challenge experience in your pocket.

comparisons.web: Core site flow centers on 20-second challenge runs.
Uses device camera for score tracking and leaderboard competition.
comparisons.app: Promotes real-time two-hand tracking plus haptic feedback.
App Store listing size is 19.6 MB.

comparisons.web: Website privacy describes camera processing as local on-device handling.
comparisons.app: App privacy label states Usage Data may be used for tracking, analytics, and advertising.

lucidBlocksSettingsAndAccessibility.title: 67 Speed Viral Trend
lucidBlocksSettingsAndAccessibility.intro: 67 Speed did not explode in one moment. It moved from a small web challenge into a repeat-hit social trend, then into a streamer-led score race.

settings.name: 67 Speed goes live as a small web challenge
settings.description: The first version launched around Thanksgiving with the same 20-second arm-speed loop used today.

settings.name: 67 Speed reaches 100,000 users
settings.description: About 13 days after launch, social sharing pushed the game to its first major user milestone.

settings.name: 67 Speed reaches 1 million users
settings.description: Roughly 63 days after creation, the game entered a second viral burst with broader global reach.

settings.name: 67 Speed becomes a public streamer score race
settings.description: Major creators drove a new spike with high-profile runs, including 380, 488, and 515.

settings.name: 67 Speed revival surges across repost culture
settings.description: The streamer comeback wave generated massive repost momentum and accelerated new-player discovery.

lucidBlocksUpdatesAndPatchNotes.title: 67 Speed Creator Story
lucidBlocksUpdatesAndPatchNotes.intro: The 67 Speed creator story combines fast iteration, movement-tracking tuning, and social distribution loops that scaled quickly.

entries.title: 67 Speed started as a family-facing experiment
entries.description: The first build was made to entertain the creator's girlfriend's little cousins.

entries.title: 67 Speed was built through a fast AI stack loop
entries.description: The web version moved from MagicPath AI to Lovable, while the app version was developed on Anything.com.

entries.title: 67 Speed tracking sensitivity was tuned for cleaner runs
entries.description: The movement prompt and sensitivity settings were iterated multiple times to improve camera detection quality.

entries.title: 67 Speed growth came from short-form clips
entries.description: Instagram and TikTok videos created the first large discovery loop without relying on paid installs.

entries.title: 67 Speed accounts reinforced return play
entries.description: Optional signup and leaderboard identity supported daily replay behavior for core players.

lucidBlocksCrashFixAndTroubleshooting.title: 67 Speed Device Compatibility
lucidBlocksCrashFixAndTroubleshooting.intro: 67 Speed is easiest to access in a browser, and the official iOS app offers a dedicated mobile path. Across all devices, camera framing quality decides run consistency.

items.notes: Instant play with no download, plus direct leaderboard access.
Mobile play works best in landscape orientation with clear lighting.

items.access: Install 67 SPEED - Six Seven from the App Store.
items.notes: Requires iOS 17.6 or later and supports 10-second and 20-second rounds.

items.access: Install the same App Store app on iPad.
items.notes: Requires iPadOS 17.6 or later and is optimized for iPad sessions.

faq.title: 67 Speed Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about 67 Speed

questions.question: What is 67 Speed?
questions.answer: 67 Speed is a camera-based challenge game where you alternate arm pumps to chase higher scores in short timed rounds.

questions.question: How do I get better scores in 67 Speed?
questions.answer: Use stable framing, strong front lighting, compact arm motion, and a consistent pace from start to finish.

questions.question: Where can I play 67 Speed?
questions.answer: You can play instantly on 67speed.com, and iPhone users can also use the official iOS app.

questions.question: Does 67 Speed work on mobile?
questions.answer: Yes. Mobile play works best in landscape mode with clear lighting and camera permission enabled.

questions.question: How does 67 Speed privacy work?
questions.answer: Official guidance says camera processing is handled locally on your device during gameplay.

questions.question: How do I join the 67 Speed verified leaderboard?
questions.answer: Create an account and follow the official verification flow linked through @67.speed updates.
